funny_fact: Lighters in garbage trucks have caused fires.
special_note: Must be completely empty before general waste

aliases: rubber gloves|cleaning gloves|dish gloves|latex gloves|kitchen gloves
mascot_funny_text: Those gloves protected your hands but not the environment.
funny_fact: Rubber gloves are not recyclable.

aliases: vacuum cleaner|vacuum|dyson|robot vacuum|handheld vacuum|stick vacuum
mascot_funny_text: It sucked. Literally. That was its job. And now it's done.
funny_fact: Small electronics are picked up free in Korea.

aliases: iron|clothes iron|steam iron|garment steamer
mascot_funny_text: You ironed once in 2024. The iron remembers.
funny_fact: Irons are classified as small electronics for free pickup.

aliases: humidifier|air humidifier|ultrasonic humidifier|cool mist humidifier
mascot_funny_text: Seoul winter air is drier than your humor. RIP humidifier.
funny_fact: Korea had a humidifier disinfectant scandal in 2011 — 1,500+ deaths.

aliases: air purifier|air cleaner|HEPA filter machine|air filter
mascot_funny_text: It fought the fine dust and the fine dust won.
funny_fact: Seoul's fine dust (미세먼지) levels exceed WHO guidelines 100+ days/year.
special_note: Free pickup. Filter → General waste separately

aliases: yoga mat|exercise mat|fitness mat|gym mat|pilates mat
mascot_funny_text: Namaste in the trash. Your downward dog days are over.
funny_fact: Yoga mats are made of PVC — one of the hardest plastics to recycle.
special_note: If too large → Bulky waste registration

aliases: dumbbell|weight|kettlebell|hand weight|exercise weight
step_1_text: Register as bulky waste if heavy
step_2_text: Or take to scrap metal dealer (고철상)
mascot_funny_text: Those weights collected more dust than gains.
funny_fact: Scrap metal dealers (고철상) will sometimes pay you for heavy metal items.
special_note: Scrap metal dealer may buy these

aliases: plant pot|flower pot|ceramic pot|plastic pot|planter
mascot_funny_text: The plant died. The pot is next. Circle of life.
funny_fact: Soil can go in food waste or garden areas — not in bags.
special_note: Soil → sprinkle in garden area. Large pots → Bulky waste

aliases: shoe rack|shoe shelf|shoe organizer|small shoe cabinet
mascot_funny_text: It held 47 pairs of shoes you wore 3 of. Goodbye.
funny_fact: Small furniture items have the lowest bulky waste fees.

aliases: microwave|microwave oven|old microwave|broken microwave
mascot_funny_text: It heated 10,000 convenience store meals. A true soldier.
funny_fact: Microwaves are classified as small electronics — FREE pickup.

aliases: milk jug|plastic milk container|large milk bottle
mascot_funny_text: That's a lot of cereal evidence.
funny_fact: Plastic milk jugs are one of the most efficiently recycled plastics.

aliases: yogurt cup|yoghurt container|yakult bottle|yogurt bottle
mascot_funny_text: Your gut health journey creates a lot of plastic. Ironic.
funny_fact: Yakult bottles are one of Korea's most recognizable recyclables.

aliases: ice cream tub|ice cream container|gelato container|baskin robbins container
mascot_funny_text: You ate the whole tub? In one sitting? No judgment. OK some judgment.
funny_fact: Paper ice cream containers with plastic lining → check material.
special_note: If paper-based → Paper recycling. If plastic → Plastic recycling

aliases: perfume bottle|cologne bottle|serum bottle|glass cosmetic bottle|essential oil bottle
mascot_funny_text: That ₩200,000 serum is gone. The bottle lives on.
funny_fact: Remove all caps and droppers — those are mixed material → General waste.

aliases: spray bottle|cleaning spray bottle|trigger spray|mist bottle
mascot_funny_text: The spray nozzle is the villain here. Remove it.
funny_fact: Spray nozzles are mixed material — always remove before recycling.
special_note: Nozzle → General waste. Bottle → Plastic recycling

aliases: tetra pak|aseptic carton|long-life milk carton|juice tetra pak|almond milk carton
mascot_funny_text: This carton has more layers than your personality. Rinse it.
funny_fact: Tetra Paks have 6 layers: paper, polyethylene, aluminum.
special_note: Separate from regular paper AND regular cartons

aliases: plastic cap|bottle cap plastic|water bottle cap|soda cap plastic
step_2_text: Put in transparent bag with plastics
mascot_funny_text: Tiny but important. Collect a bunch before recycling.
funny_fact: Caps are different plastic (PP) than bottles (PET) — separate them.

aliases: rubber band|elastic band|hair tie|rubber ring
mascot_funny_text: Too small, too stretchy, too useless to recycle.
funny_fact: Rubber bands are not recyclable in Korea.

aliases: zipper bag|ziplock bag|resealable bag|sandwich bag|freezer bag
mascot_funny_text: You reused it 3 times. That's actually impressive. Now recycle it.
funny_fact: Clean zipper bags are recyclable as vinyl/film.

aliases: aluminum tray|foil tray|takeout aluminum container|disposable aluminum pan
mascot_funny_text: That samgyeopsal tray served you well. Clean it up.
funny_fact: Aluminum trays are infinitely recyclable if cleaned.

aliases: paper|printer paper|A4 paper|copy paper|white paper|office paper
mascot_funny_text: You printed 47 pages for a 2-minute meeting. The trees felt that.
funny_fact: Korea uses 8.8 million tons of paper per year.
special_note: Remove staples and clips if possible

aliases: sticky note|post-it|post it note|memo pad sticky
mascot_funny_text: Your wall of sticky notes is not a productivity system. It's chaos.
funny_fact: The adhesive on sticky notes doesn't affect paper recycling.

aliases: binder|plastic folder|ring binder|file folder|document holder
mascot_funny_text: That binder from university? It's been 5 years. Let go.
funny_fact: Paper inside → Paper recycling.

aliases: ink cartridge|toner cartridge|printer cartridge|printer ink
step_1_text: Drop at electronics store or 주민센터
mascot_funny_text: That cartridge costs more per ml than champagne.
funny_fact: Printer ink is one of the most expensive liquids — $2,700/gallon.

aliases: stapler|staples|paper stapler|desk stapler
mascot_funny_text: It stapled 10,000 documents. A quiet hero.
funny_fact: Remove staples from paper before recycling the paper.

aliases: cat litter|kitty litter|used cat litter|cat sand
step_1_text: Bag it and put in general waste
mascot_funny_text: Your cat judges your recycling. Don't let them down.
funny_fact: Cat litter is NOT food waste — it clogs processing machines.

aliases: pet food can|dog food can|cat food can|wet food can
mascot_funny_text: Your pet eats better than you do. At least recycle the evidence.
funny_fact: Pet food cans are the same as human food cans — fully recyclable.

aliases: pet waste bag|dog poop bag|pet poop bag
step_1_text: Tie it up and put in general waste
mascot_funny_text: Good human for picking it up. Now dispose it properly.
funny_fact: Pet waste is NOT food waste. General waste only.

aliases: christmas tree|artificial tree|fake tree|holiday tree|xmas tree
mascot_funny_text: It brought joy for 30 days. Now it brings a disposal fee.
funny_fact: Artificial trees should be used 10+ years to offset their carbon footprint.

aliases: gift box|present box|holiday box|chuseok gift box|설날 gift box
mascot_funny_text: That Chuseok gift set box is bigger than the gift inside.
funny_fact: Korean holiday gift sets generate 30% more packaging waste.

aliases: ribbon|gift ribbon|bow|decorative ribbon|gift bow
mascot_funny_text: Pretty but pointless for recycling.
funny_fact: Ribbons tangle in recycling machinery.

aliases: face mask|disposable mask|KF94 mask|surgical mask|COVID mask
mascot_funny_text: COVID is over but the mask waste lives on.
funny_fact: Korea used 2 billion disposable masks during COVID peak years.
special_note: Cut ear loops to protect wildlife

aliases: wet wipes|baby wipes|cleaning wipes|disinfecting wipes|makeup wipes
mascot_funny_text: Wet wipes are NOT flushable. Your plumber begs you.
funny_fact: Wet wipes cause 93% of sewer blockages worldwide.

aliases: diaper|nappy|baby diaper|adult diaper|disposable diaper
step_1_text: Roll up and put in general waste
mascot_funny_text: 500 years to decompose. Your baby will be long gone. So will you.
funny_fact: A baby uses 6,000 diapers before potty training.

aliases: cigarette butt|cigarette|cig butt|smoke butt
step_1_text: Put in general waste (not on the ground!)
mascot_funny_text: The ground is not an ashtray. Korea fines ₩100,000 for littering.
funny_fact: Cigarette butts are the #1 most littered item on Earth.

aliases: USB drive|flash drive|thumb drive|SD card|memory card|USB stick
mascot_funny_text: That USB has your college thesis and 47 memes. Wipe it.
funny_fact: E-waste bins at 주민센터 accept all small electronics.

aliases: headphones|earbuds|earphones|AirPods|bluetooth earbuds|wired earphones
mascot_funny_text: One earbud always dies first. Now they're both dead.
funny_fact: Wireless earbuds contain lithium batteries — never in regular trash.

aliases: board game|puzzle|jigsaw puzzle|card game|toy
mascot_funny_text: Missing 3 pieces? It's not a game anymore. It's trash.
funny_fact: Separate what you can: cardboard box → Paper recycling.

aliases: stuffed animal|plush toy|teddy bear|soft toy|doll
mascot_funny_text: It watched you sleep for 15 years. Time for a new home.
funny_fact: Clean stuffed animals can be donated. Damaged → General waste.

aliases: blister pack|pill packaging|medicine packaging|foil pill pack
